applied_optimizations.name: Triton GEMM kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented Triton @triton.jit GEMM kernel for pointwise convolution. Uses BLOCK_M=256, BLOCK_N=128, BLOCK_K=64 to cover all channels in one shot. Correct but significantly slower than native Conv2d.

attempted_but_failed.name: torch.compile wrapper
attempted_but_failed.reason: Task requires Triton @triton.jit kernels, not torch.compile

attempted_but_failed.name: Various Triton kernel structures
attempted_but_failed.reason: LLVM translation errors or grid size overflow

notes: Native Conv2d on ROCm is highly optimized (rocBLAS/hipBLASLt)
Triton kernel correctness achieved with fp32 tl.dot
Performance is 14x slower than baseline - Triton GEMM not competitive with vendor BLAS for this shape
Problem dimensions: batch=16, C_in=64, C_out=128, H=1024, W=1024
Best approach for this problem would be torch.compile (SCORE: 60.0) but task requires Triton kernels
